completeness.bounded_by: OSRS Wiki Optimal quest guide tables (main + Ironman + F2P editorial sequences)
known_missing: Notable quest unlocks section (transcluded template {{Optimal quest guide/Recommended Quests}}; not in raw wikitext of these pages)
Per-quest skill/XP requirements columns omitted by domain spec (record schema is order_index/quest/account_variant/notable_unlocks)
Free-to-play/Ironman combined sub-guide (Optimal quest guide/Free-to-play/Ironman) not requested

fix_notes: 2026-06-17: Re-tagged 1 mis-classified row (ironman order_index 179, 'All Easy Achievement Diaries') from row_type=quest/is_quest=true to row_type=achievement_diary/is_quest=false (group diary row, qp=0, per source wikitext); corrected domain_stats counters (ironman_true_quests 190->189, row_type_counts.quest 402->401, achievement_diary 39->40). No new data fetched.

records.notable_unlocks: Unlocks the ability to use lamps and books of knowledge on the Runecraft skill.
Allows raising of cats. It is recommended to start raising a kitten to speed up Recipe for Disaster/Freeing Evil Dave and Ratcatchers.

Allows access to Varlamore. Consider completing this quest whilst in Varrock Square during Gertrude's Cat to minimise time spent moving back and forth. Additionally, visit Varlamore once via Regulus Cento in order to unlock all other transportation methods to the region.

It is recommended to complete (or choose the option to skip) the Barbarian Assault tutorial, to unlock the minigame teleport. This makes it easier to reach the quest finish location more quickly. Or just use the teleport from a games necklace. Be sure to start the Alfred Grimhand's Barcrawl miniquest when you are there, and visit nearby bars while questing. Grants access to the dwarf multicannon and allows smithing of cannonballs. It may be advantageous to progress Doric's Quest and The Knight's Sword when visiting Nulodion near Falador for this quest.
Speak to King Bolren part-way through the quest to start Tree Gnome Village and unlock Elkoy's follow option.
Grants the ability to use spirit trees.

Grants access to the Herblore skill. Players can start (but unadvised to attempt to finish) Dragon Slayer I after this quest to be allowed to equip the anti-dragon shield to make some quests easier. However this will enable dragon tasks for Slayer which give low experience per hour.
Gives access to Giants' Foundry minigame. If you complete nine iron/steel sword commissions now, it will take care of Smithing training you will need later.
Grants the use of Ardougne teleport and Ardougne teleport (tablet).
Gives access to Creature Creation minigame.

Allows use of gnome glider transportation system. Along with the earlier completion of Fight Arena, Holy Grail, Tree Gnome Village, and Witch's House, this unlocks the Nightmare Zone minigame teleport due to having five quest bosses unlocked.
Use the Antique lamp (easy) on Agility. This unlocks an infinite teleport to the Ardougne Monastery.
Allows access to Morytania. Consider gathering all resources for both this quest and Nature Spirit to reduce travel back and forth.
The quest unlocks Ectophial and gives free access to Port Phasmatys.
Allows access to Nardok's Bone Weapons where players can purchase the Dorgeshuun crossbow and bone bolts for early Ranged training.

records.quest: The Ribbiting Tale of a Lily Pad Labour Dispute

records.notable_unlocks: Grants the ability to make cosmic runes and to use the dragon dagger and the dragon longsword. It is recommended to cut and save two dramen branches for use in later quests.

Immediately start Fairytale II - Cure a Queen and progress until you unlock the fairy ring network (see that quest's guide), and leave the rest of the quest for later. Unlocking this greatly improves mobility around the world, and gives access to several Achievement Diary tasks.

records.quest: Recipe for Disaster/Freeing the Goblin generals
Recipe for Disaster/Freeing the Mountain Dwarf

records.notable_unlocks: Requires starting The Giant Dwarf to access Keldagrim, but completion is not required. Unlocks lazy and wily cats, useful for catching hell-rats later on. To save time, one can easily grab Rat poison and complete Clock Tower when in Ardougne for Jimmy Dazzler. Additionally, complete The Feud while in Pollnivneach for the snake charmer.
You need a partner for this quest. This quest also gives access to another lamp when talking to Historian Minas.

Unlocks Fossil Island, which gives access to ammonite crabs for combat training and possible fossil drops, and bird house trapping for fast Hunter experience. It is recommended to train Hunter on bird houses from now on.
Unlocks the Dorgesh-Kaan–Keldagrim train system.
Unlocks access to Ava's devices.
Unlocks access to the balloon transport system.

records.quest: Unlock: Balloon transport system to Crafting Guild
Unlock: Balloon transport system to Varrock

records.notable_unlocks: Useful for its reward of 5 Quest points, which grants players more time inside the Tears of Guthix minigame.
Gives access to the Tears of Guthix minigame, which provides experience in your lowest skill.
Grants the ability to make law runes.

Starting this quest unlocks dragons Slayer tasks, and access to anti-dragon shields and antifire potions. These tasks give low experience per hour, so it can be beneficial not to start this quest any earlier.
Gives access to spicy stews, which can be useful for boosting stats.
Unlocks access to the crystal saw, which gives an invisible +3 boost to Construction.

records.quest: Recipe for Disaster/Freeing the Lumbridge Guide

records.notable_unlocks: Gives access to Managing Miscellania.
Ability to use the Civitas illa Fortis Teleport spell and the Quetzal Transport System in Varlamore
Unlocks the ability to use Ancient Magicks.
Boost magic using a magic potion, or alternatively train 2 more levels and boost using a wizard's mind bomb. Unlocks steel gauntlets which can be useful when training Smithing, Cooking or Magic.
Unlocks access to battlestaves in Zaff's Superior Staffs!
Unlocks box trap hunting.

records.quest: Recipe for Disaster/Freeing Sir Amik Varze

records.notable_unlocks: Unlocks more spells in the Arceuus spellbook. Use both Antique lamp (A Kingdom Divided) on Slayer.
Access to Master Tier Hunters' Rumours. This shouldn't require much training if birdhouses were done during prior quests.

records.quest: Unlock: Balloon transport system to Castle Wars

records.notable_unlocks: Unlocks the Lunar spellbook's core spells.
Unlocks additional spells in the Lunar spellbook. Use the Dreamy lamp on Magic.

records.quest: Unlock: Balloon transport system to Grand Tree
Desert Treasure II - The Fallen Empire

records.notable_unlocks: Unlocks access to the Feldip Hills via boat.
Allows access to Varlamore. While in the Varrock town square:

Allows raising of cats. Raise a kitten to a cat to speed up Recipe for Disaster/Freeing Evil Dave and Ratcatchers. Note: Raw karambwanji is a stackable fish that can be fed to cats. Consider catching some on the next trip to Karamja. Save the stew reward for The Queen of Thieves, and the chocolate cake for A Tail of Two Cats.
Unlocks the ability to use lamps and books of knowledge on the Runecraft skill. Complete during Demon Slayer.
Allows the use of spirit trees. Optional: Hardcore ironmen may consider completing Witch's House first for the safety of the additional hitpoints.
Allows use of Ardougne teleport spell.

records.quest: Unlock: Barbarian Assault teleport Partially complete Alfred Grimhand's Barcrawl

records.notable_unlocks: Grants access to the Herblore skill.

You should be at the step to bring the ammo mould and Nulodion's notes to Captain Lawgof to complete the quest. Completion of this quest allows the use of the dwarf multicannon and smithing of cannonballs.
Allows access to Morytania. After completion of this quest, use the antique lamp you have been holding since completing the easy Ardougne diary on Prayer.

records.quest: Partially complete: Rag and Bone Man I

records.notable_unlocks: You should now have visited all of the required bars. Return to the Barbarian Guard at the gate to the east of the Barbarian Assault building with the barcrawl card to complete the miniquest. Allows use of Barbarian Outpost Agility Course which is required in Scorpion Catcher and Horror from the Deep.

Before starting Scorpion Catcher, partial completion of Dragon Slayer I will unlock the Anti-dragon shield to make this quest safer by protecting you from dragonfire in the Taverley Dungeon step. To collect the shield:

records.quest: Partially complete: Rag and Bone Man II

records.notable_unlocks: Allows use of gnome glider transportation system.
Completion of this quest grants you the Smithing level required to smith iron bars. Smelt both the iron ore and the blurite ore you have gathered at the Falador furnace.
Grants the ability to make and use elemental mind equipment. Bring an extra 4 coal if you plan on making a mind shield.

records.quest: The Ribbiting Tale of a Lily Pad Labour Dispute

records.notable_unlocks: Grants the ability to make cosmic runes and to use the dragon dagger and the dragon longsword.

records.quest: Partially complete: Fairytale II - Cure a Queen
Recipe for Disaster/Freeing the Goblin generals

records.notable_unlocks: Unlocks Giants' Foundry.

Allows access to Nardok's Bone Weapons where players can purchase the Dorgeshuun crossbow and bone bolts for early Ranged training. Keep the ring of life quest reward for Curse of Arrav if you do not plan to obtain more.

Make sure to keep a set of polished buttons from H.A.M. members for Animal Magnetism later. Kill a Cave bug during the quest while traveling underground for an easy Lumbridge & Draynor Diary task. The sapphire lantern is required to complete Tears of Guthix. Consider completing this quest earlier if you have 49 Firemaking as it unlocks a useful weekly minigame for gathering experience in your lowest skill.

A good tip for lower levels: Using Efaritay's aid allows you to use weapons other than the silver sickle when equipped. A mithril bar is needed for this quest. One can be easily obtained by killing chaos dwarves in Taverley Dungeon.
Grants the ability to make law runes.
Starting this quest unlocks dragon tasks for Slayer. Completing this quest allows you to use green d'hide body, rune platebody and dragon platebody.
Completing this quest allows you to buy God books. The book of war is cheap protection for God Wars Dungeon.

Allows use of balloon transport system. If the 12 willow branches are obtained from planting the Auguste's sapling, it will require wait 4 hours for the willow tree to grow and then 5 more minutes per branch after checking its health. It may be more desirable to grow your own willow tree before even starting the quest. If you're growing your own willow tree during this quest, you should obtain an extra 6 willow branches so that you may complete the medium Falador Diary task of crafting a basket on the Falador farm loom.

records.quest: Unlock: Balloon transport system to Crafting Guild
Recipe for Disaster/Freeing the Mountain Dwarf

records.notable_unlocks: This quest unlocks the ectophial for an unlimited teleport to the Ectofuntus, and gives free access to Port Phasmatys.
Gain access to spicy stews during the quest, which can be useful for boosting stats.
Completion of this quest allows you to make ogre arrows. Keep the Ogre bow for Recipe for Disaster/Freeing Skrach Uglogwee.

records.quest: Recipe for Disaster/Freeing the Lumbridge Guide

records.notable_unlocks: Alternatively can be left until you have 60+ combat stats as this quest has a difficult boss and unlocks no others.
Unlocks Guardians of the Rift.

records.quest: Unlock: Balloon transport system to Varrock

records.notable_unlocks: Also allows access to the Tears of Guthix minigame, which provides experience in your lowest skill.

records.quest: Recipe for Disaster/Freeing Sir Amik Varze
Desert Treasure II - The Fallen Empire
